corpus.role: generated training data — reproducible, not required to be stored

model.role: trained model weights — custodian decides whether to commit

node_state.role: thinking session state — always gitignored, never committed

venv.role: Python virtual environment — created by tools/activate_node.py

peers.role: peer nodes — horizontal contact, sovereign, no inheritance; gitignored

default_node.note: Default directory mapping for any node. Override by adding a [node_name] group with the same keys.

affluence.role: raw incoming signal crossing the membrane — pre-processed, not yet integrated

effluence.role: custodian-selected outgoing artifacts — what the node has chosen to carry forward

scripts.role: node-level scripts — manifest and node-specific tooling; included in frame bundle
